entries.source: Chat Edit: 'fully audit any other C++ stuff and fully convert it to full pure masm'

Chat Edit: 'Wire executor in orchestrator: Call agent_action_executor_run from zero_cpp_unified_bridge.asm after planning to execute the generated tasks. Want me to patch that?
Metrics: Add lightweight counters/timers per AI Toolkit (e.g., tasks executed, duration) to a central metrics module. I can add hooks where we just implemented logs.
Targeted build: If ml64.exe is available on your machine, run & "C:\masm32\bin\ml64.exe" /c /Fo obj\\agent_action_executor.obj agent_action_executor.asm from final-ide, or share the correct MASM path and I’ll run it for this file only.
Would you like me to patch the orchestrator to invoke the executor and add metrics hooks next?'
